things.name: Basilique Sainte-Anne du Congo
things.description: Striking 1949 colonial basilica with a pyramid-like facade built of red bricks

things.name: Poto-Poto Painting School
things.description: Legendary 1951 African art school that launched the Poto-Poto style of painting

things.name: Brazzaville – Kinshasa Ferry
things.description: Cross the Congo River to Kinshasa - the two closest capital cities in the world

things.name: Marché Total (Total Market)
things.description: Brazzaville's main market with extraordinary Central African textiles and handicrafts

things.name: Musee National des Arts et Traditions du Congo
things.description: Traditional Kongo, Teke and Mbochi art, masks and musical instruments

things.name: Corniche Riverside Walk
things.description: Scenic walk along the Congo River with views of Kinshasa's skyline

things.name: Centre Culturel Francais (Institut Francais)
things.description: Active arts and performance venue - check for concerts and exhibitions

things.name: Lesio-Louna Gorilla Reserve
things.description: Rescued western lowland gorillas in a forest reserve north of the city

things.name: La Corniche Night Life
things.description: Vibrant nightlife strip along the Congo riverbank - rumba music capital of Central Africa

things.name: Saka-Saka (Cassava Leaves)
things.description: National dish of pounded cassava leaves slow-cooked with smoked fish and palm oil
